EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriGeometryHitPartType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Describes the parts of a geometry that can be located by their proximity to a query point. Specified as a parameter to the HitTest method.

[Guid("8448500B-9284-11D1-B987-080009EE4E51")]
public enum esriGeometryHitPartType

Fields

esriGeometryPartBoundary = 4

4: Locates a point anywhere on the boundary of a polygon, or anywhere on a polyline, that is closest to the query point.

esriGeometryPartCentroid = 32

32: Locates the geometric centroid of a polygon or the center of an envelope closest to the query point.

esriGeometryPartEndpoint = 16

16: Locates an endpoint of the polyline closest to the query point.

esriGeometryPartMidpoint = 8

8: Locates a midpoint of a segment belonging to a polygon or polyline that is closest to the query point.

esriGeometryPartNone = 0

0: Not used.

esriGeometryPartSurface = 64

64: Locates a point anywhere on the surface of a polygon or multipatch that is closest to the query ray.

esriGeometryPartVertex = 1

1: Locates a vertex of the geometry closest to the query point.

Made with docfx
